data.label: Civil Registry Record
data.description:
A complete civil registry entry for one person. This is the anchor node in the Cordova graph — the Person cell that every other domain references.
Business Context: Authoritative source of truth for all government identity verification
Purpose: Complete identity record for a Cordova resident

items.label: National ID (CID)
items.description: Cordova National Identity Number. Format: COR-PPCC-NNNNNN where PP is the two-letter province code (AL=Aldara, BR=Brevina, CE=Celara), CC is the two-digit city code (01-03), and NNNNNN is a six-digit sequence number. Issued at birth or naturalization. Required for all government transactions.

items.label: Country of Birth
items.description: Country where participant was born

items.label: Given Name (Person)
items.description:
name typically used to differentiate people from the same family, clan, or other social group who have a common last name
aka. first name or forename

items.label: Middle Name (Person)
items.description: Middle or other name(s) given to identify a person

items.label: Surname (Person)
items.description:
The surname or family name of a person, part of a naming scheme for individuals, used in many cultures worldwide
aka: last name, fam name, family surname, surname, clan name

items.label: City
items.description: One of the nine cities in the Republic of Cordova.

items.label: Marital Status (Cordova)
items.description: Marital status as recorded in the Cordova Civil Registry. Aligned with vital statistics records.

items.label: Province
items.description: One of the three provinces of the Republic of Cordova. Used across civil registry, property, tax, and all geographic records.

items.label: Gender Identity
items.description: Self-reported gender identity of the participant

items.label: Sex
items.description: Biological sex assigned at birth based on physical characteristics. UMLS CUI: C0079399 (Biologic Sex). Aligned with OMB standards for reporting.

items.label: Birth Date
items.description: Date of birth of the participant. UMLS CUI: C0421451 (Date of birth). LOINC: 21112-8 (Birth date).

items.label: Contact Information
items.description:
Phone, email, and preferred contact method for the person.
Purpose: Enable government communication with the person
Parent Cluster: Civil Registry Record

items.label: Cordova Email Address
items.description: Email address using one of the Cordova national email providers. Providers: cordomail.co, novamail.co, portocorreo.co

items.label: Cordova Phone Number
items.description: Cordova national telephone number. Format: +99-PPP-NNN-NNNN where +99 is the country code and PPP is the area code. Area codes: Porto Sereno=100, Vistamar=110, Rioseco=120, Campoluz=200, Tierraverde=210, Montecara=220, Novaciudad=300, Piedrasol=310, Lagunavista=320.

items.label: Preferred Contact Method
items.description: Participant's preferred method of contact

items.label: Current Address
items.description:
The person's current residential address within Cordova.
Purpose: Current residential address for correspondence and jurisdiction determination
Parent Cluster: Civil Registry Record

items.label: Address (Line 1)
items.description: Street address line, building/apartment number, or P.O. Box number.

items.label: Address (Line 2)
items.description: Street address line, building/apartment number, or P.O. Box number.

items.label: Family Relationships
items.description:
Links between persons in the Civil Registry. Each relationship record connects two National IDs.
Business Context: Enables cross-person queries (family units, next of kin, guardianship)
Purpose: Record familial and legal relationships between persons
Parent Cluster: Civil Registry Record

items.label: Relationship Type
items.description: Familial or legal relationship between two persons in the Cordova Civil Registry.

items.label: Relationship End Date
items.description: Date the relationship ended, if applicable (e.g., divorce date, death date). Null for active relationships.

items.label: Relationship Start Date
items.description:
Date the relationship was established or recorded (e.g., marriage date, birth date of child, guardianship order date)

---

subject.label: Related Person
subject.description: Person related to the civil registry subject via family relationship (parent, child, spouse, etc.). W3C PROV-DM Agent (Person) with Cordova CID.

provider.label: Civil Registry Office
provider.description: Government office responsible for civil registry records (births, marriages, deaths, name changes). W3C PROV-DM Agent (Organization).
